programmes.show_description: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1982!
Bruno Brookes with the year of the Kids from Fame and Eurovision's Bucks Fizz and Bardo! And we also first encountered future global superstars George Michael and Boy George.

Battle of the Glasgow '80s supergroups as Simple Minds go up against Deacon Blue!
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
In the 80s the Scottish scene was vibrant and creative with punk, indie, synth, acoustic and Celtic folk influences topping the charts. Altered Images' Clare Grogan has 30 of the best.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!

programmes.show_name: Matt Goss' Famous Pop of the 80s!
programmes.show_description: Matt has hand-picked 25 tracks by amazing performers - all of them famous pop songs of the '80s. From Madness in 1980 to Madonna in 1989, plus his new video 'Beautiful Unknown.'
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
With just five years as a partnership, Andrew and George produced these 10 chart hits in the mid 1980s. George went on to greater things, but what happened to lovely Andrew?
10 classic looks that set the fashion of the 80s! From 1983's leather vest on first video "Everybody" to the Blonde Ambition corsets of Express Yourself at the end of the decade.
25 fabulous dance tracks from the UK and across Europe.
Duncan James and his band Blue represented the UK in 2011 - coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners and losers over 50 years - here are 2 hours of highs - and lows!

programmes.show_name: So Awful, Yet So Amazing! Top 20
programmes.show_description: Twenty songs and videos from the '80s that some would think are pretty awful, but we think are just magnificent - in their own way! Please leave credibility shoes at the door.

programmes.show_name: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programmes.show_description: They say 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.
